com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope.GlobalConfiguration

Packages that use GlobalConfiguration 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope  

  • Uses of GlobalConfiguration in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope that implement GlobalConfiguration 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  AbstractGlobalConfiguration
    Base class for GlobalConfigurable instances.
    class  MainGlobalConfiguration
    Default global configuration.
    Fields in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope declared as GlobalConfiguration 
    Modifier and Type Field Description
    GlobalConfiguration MainApplicationScope.globalConfiguration  
    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope that return GlobalConfiguration 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    GlobalConfiguration JvmScope.getGlobalConfiguration()  
    GlobalConfiguration GlobalConfiguration.withCleanStackTrace()
    Indicates that exception stack traces should omit references to this library.
    GlobalConfiguration GlobalConfiguration.withDefaultTerminalEncoding()
    Indicates that the terminal encoding should be auto-detected.
    GlobalConfiguration GlobalConfiguration.withDefaultTerminalWidth()
    Indicates that the terminal width should be auto-detected.
    GlobalConfiguration GlobalConfiguration.withDiff()
    Indicates that exceptions should show the difference between the actual and expected values.
    GlobalConfiguration GlobalConfiguration.withoutCleanStackTrace()
    Indicates that exception stack traces should contain references to this library.
    GlobalConfiguration GlobalConfiguration.withoutDiff()
    Indicates that exceptions should not show the difference between the actual and expected values.
    GlobalConfiguration GlobalConfiguration.withTerminalEncoding​(TerminalEncoding encoding)
    Indicates the type of encoding that the terminal supports.
    GlobalConfiguration GlobalConfiguration.withTerminalWidth​(int width)
    Indicates the width of the terminal.
